name: Meeting Preparation Workflow
description: Gather context, brief attendees, and produce a structured agenda for an upcoming meeting

inputs.name: meeting_topic
inputs.description: The subject or purpose of the meeting

inputs.name: attendees
inputs.description: List of attendees and their roles

inputs.name: meeting_datetime
inputs.description: Date and time of the meeting

inputs.name: background_docs
inputs.description: Relevant documents, prior meeting notes, or URLs to include

outputs.name: agenda
outputs.description: Structured agenda with timed slots for each topic

outputs.name: briefing_doc
outputs.description: One-page attendee briefing covering context, goals, and pre-read material

outputs.name: action_items
outputs.description: List of outstanding action items from prior meetings relevant to this one

steps: Confirm the meeting topic, attendees, and datetime with the user
Search memory and recent conversation history for relevant context on the topic

steps.if: background documents or URLs were provided
then: Read or fetch the provided documents and extract key facts
else: Summarise any available context from memory relevant to the topic

steps: Draft a structured agenda: opening, agenda items with time allocations, and AOB slot
Draft a one-page attendee briefing: meeting goal, background context, discussion questions, and pre-read links
Compile any open action items from prior meetings that are relevant to this session
Present the agenda and briefing doc to the user for review and approval

then: Incorporate the requested changes and re-present the revised documents
